concerns.text: Task T030 'Code cleanup and refactoring for CPU memory optimization' lacks concrete deliverable and verification criteria. What files? What metrics define 'done'? Suggest: 'Profile memory usage with tracemalloc; ensure peak RAM ≤7GB on 10-subject sample; document in docs/memory_profile.md'

Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned in code/, but no task explicitly addresses random seed configuration. Missing task: 'Pin random seeds (numpy, torch, python) in src/config/seeds.py with documented seed values'

Task T029 'Documentation updates in docs/ including power analysis (FR-010)' is vague. Which files? What content? Suggest: 'Create docs/power_analysis.md with TTestPower methodology, assumed d=0.5, α=0.05, target power=0.80'
Task T019 specifies 'AAL atlas DMN nodes' but spec.md US-2/FR-003 requires 'Yeo 7-network atlas DMN component masks'. Atlas inconsistency creates implementation ambiguity. Clarify which atlas to use.

Task T001 'Initialize Python project structure' could be more specific. Suggest: 'Create directories: src/, tests/, data/, reports/, docs/, src/config/, src/data/, src/preprocessing/, src/connectivity/, src/meta_analysis/'

Test tasks (T009, T010, T017, T018, T025) name files but don't specify test cases. Suggest adding: 'Contract test verifies API returns expected JSON schema' or 'Unit test verifies NBS returns p-value array of shape (n_nodes, n_nodes)'
